Unlike traditional algorithms, DoS draws algorithmic framework from the inspiration, but its search mechanism is construc

items.title: Who Wrote the Book? Detecting and Attributing LLM Ghostwriters
items.description: In this paper, we introduce GhostWriteBench, a dataset for LLM authorship attribution. items.title: Event6D: Event-based Novel Object 6D Pose Tracking
items.description: Event cameras provide microsecond latency, making them suitable for 6D object pose tracking in fast, dynamic scenes where conventional RGB and depth pipelines suffer from motion blur and large pixel displacements.
